overall.description: A first-person exploration through a dimly lit gothic cathedral or castle interior. The player walks through stone corridors and a grand pillared hall illuminated by torches and chandeliers, encountering an armored character before approaching a large wooden door.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand gothic hall with massive stone pillars, chandeliers, and torch sconces. The camera walks down a blue carpeted aisle toward a large wooden door at the far end, passing stone benches along the walls.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the end of the hall, ascending stone steps toward a massive wooden door. The pillars and benches fall behind as the door fills the frame, revealing iron handles and detailed wood grain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic gothic corridor that gradually opens into a vast, ceremonial hall. It begins with a steady walk through a narrow stone passage under a vaulted ceiling, illuminated by the flickering glow of wall torches. As the camera moves forward, an armored figure emerges from the distance and passes on the left, guiding the viewer past a side archway and a stone staircase. The scene then expands into a grand hall characterized by massive stone pillars and hanging chandeliers, where the camera glides down a blue carpeted aisle lined with stone benches. Finally, the perspective ascends a short set of stone steps as the environment narrows once more, ending as a massive, detailed wooden door with iron handles fills the frame.
